message:
Add comprehensive testing requirements to all feature parity beads

- Established parent-child relationships for all 48 tasks under their epics
- Added Testing Requirements section to each task with:
  - Unit test specifications with specific test cases
  - E2E test scenarios with real database operations
  - Logging requirements (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN levels)
- Added testing strategy overview to main epic (bd-162)
- Includes model_validate() implementation started by parallel agent

Beads structure now: 1 P0 epic, 12 P1 sub-epics, 48 tasks
All tasks are self-contained with complete implementation guidance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
